name: nextjs-prisma-crud-generator
description: Generates a standardized CRUD Server Action file for a specific Prisma model.

modelName.description: PascalCase name of the model in schema.prisma (e.g., 'Book').

revalidatePath.description: The Next.js route to revalidate after mutations (e.g., '/lectura').

useTransitions.description: Whether to optimize the output for useTransition hooks.
